name: Top Gun
description: The 1986 Navy-pilot blockbuster and its 2022 sequel — callsigns, dogfights, and 'the need for speed.'

questions.q: Who stars as Pete 'Maverick' Mitchell in Top Gun?

source.notes: Cruise's breakout star turn.

questions.q: What is Maverick's real first name?

source.notes: Pete Mitchell — callsign Maverick.

questions.q: What is the callsign of Maverick's RIO (radar intercept officer) and best friend?

source.notes: Nick 'Goose' Bradshaw, played by Anthony Edwards.

questions.q: What is the callsign of Maverick's cool-headed rival?

source.notes: Iceman — Tom Kazansky, played by Val Kilmer.

questions.q: What fighter jet do the pilots fly in the original Top Gun?

source.notes: The variable-sweep Tomcat, retired by the Navy in 2006.

questions.q: In what year was the original Top Gun released?

source.notes: Released May 16, 1986.

questions.q: What iconic line does Maverick say, quoting Goose?
choices: 'I feel the need… the need for speed'

source.notes: Delivered after Maverick is accepted to Top Gun.

questions.q: Which Oscar-winning Top Gun song is performed by Berlin?

source.notes: Won Best Original Song at the 1987 Oscars.

questions.q: Who sings the Top Gun anthem 'Danger Zone'?

source.notes: Loggins also performed 'Footloose' and 'I'm Alright.'

questions.q: Who directed the original Top Gun?

source.notes: Tony Scott was Ridley Scott's younger brother.

questions.q: Who plays Maverick's love interest Charlie (Charlotte) Blackwood?

source.notes: Kelly McGillis played the Top Gun civilian instructor.

questions.q: Who plays Goose's wife Carole, in both the 1986 film and the sequel?

source.notes: Ryan's early role; she would soon star in Harry Met Sally.

questions.q: Which callsign does Tim Robbins's character have in the original film?

source.notes: Maverick's RIO after Goose dies.

questions.q: Which actor plays the Top Gun school's commanding officer, 'Viper'?

source.notes: Commander Mike 'Viper' Metcalf.

questions.q: What happens to Goose that causes Maverick to spiral emotionally?
choices: He is killed in a training ejection accident
He is transferred to another squadron
He is shot down in combat

source.original_a: The death of his RIO, Goose
source.notes: Flat-spin ejection; Goose strikes the canopy.

questions.q: Top Gun's final dogfight takes place against planes labeled what type?

source.notes: A fictional designation; the MiG-28 doesn't exist in reality.

questions.q: In the 2022 sequel, Top Gun: Maverick, Maverick mentors the son of which deceased character?

source.notes: Rooster — Bradley Bradshaw, played by Miles Teller.

questions.q: Val Kilmer reprised Iceman in Top Gun: Maverick, conversing with Maverick via which method, reflecting Kilmer's real-life vocal condition?

source.notes: Kilmer's throat cancer left his voice severely limited; a small AI-generated voice line was used at the end.

questions.q: Which fighter plane is used by the Top Gun: Maverick aviators in the 2022 sequel?

source.notes: Though Maverick does take a vintage F-14 for one mission.

questions.q: Which veteran of 1980s cinema directed Top Gun: Maverick?

source.notes: Kosinski also directed Tron: Legacy and Oblivion.

questions.q: In 2022, Top Gun: Maverick became Cruise's first-ever film to cross what box-office milestone?

source.notes: Maverick finished at about $1.5 billion.

questions.q: Top Gun: Maverick was nominated for how many Academy Awards, winning one?

source.notes: Six nominations at the 2023 Oscars; won Best Sound.
